title: notholaena nudiuscula
intro: Notholaena nudiuscula, also known as Nudical fern, is a species of fern in the family Pteridaceae, native to the southwestern United States. The Notholaena nudiuscula plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Notholaena nudiuscula include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Notholaena nudiuscula typically involve drying the leaves and stems, then using them in teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
